findings.design_reference: NFR-007; verification-confidence phase; process honesty rule; T015
findings.comment: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED: stop the autonomous review/fix loop. Prior blocking finding 90173dc6-f2 remains unresolved and has no worktree-visible human deferral. T015 is still marked done, but no .review/verification/results.json (or equivalent machine-observed, digest-linked artifact with logs) is present. The replacement explicitly calls itself hand-authored, merely asserts that counts/exits/durations were runner-reported, and points to a digest-linked record under stripped .specrew state that is unverifiable here; the hardening gate also remains pending-post-implementation. A human must decide whether to require worktree-visible digest-linked execution evidence containing exact commands, exit codes, logs, and durations, or explicitly defer the evidence requirement in a visible decision record naming the approver and carried work.
